name: ModMe DevOps & Infrastructure Collection
description: DevOps, CI/CD, security, and infrastructure agents for Monorepo_ModMe — covering GitHub Actions, Supabase, cost optimization, and deployment.

items.usage: Security audit — OWASP, secrets, supply chain
Audit and optimize CI minutes and workflow cost
Audit MCP server configurations for security issues
Configure Dependabot for automated dependency updates
Detect exposed secrets and credentials in the codebase
Review Postgres migrations and schema for quality
